title: OSPF: R20 Process 10, Router-ID Loopback0, Interface Areas, /16 Summary (Area 40)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: OSPF is preconfigured on all devices except R20. Configure R20 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Configure OSPF according to the topology: (1) Use Process ID 10. (2) Use Loopback0 for the Router ID. (3) Advertise all networks into OSPF — do NOT use network statements under the OSPF process.
Task 2: Configure a /16 summary route for Area 40.
hints: R20'de 'show run int lo0' ile Loopback0 adresini doğrula (10.0.1.20 bekleniyor); router-id bu adres olmalı.
Network statement YASAK: 'ip ospf 10 area X' ile interface altında etkinleştir (Lo0/e0/0/e0/1 Area 0, e0/2 Area 40).
answer_key_raw:
R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# router ospf 10
R20(config-router)# router-id 10.0.1.20
R20(config-router)# area 40 range 10.40.0.0 255.255.0.0
R20(config-router)# exit
R20(config)# interface range loopback0,Ethernet0/0-1
R20(config-if-range)# ip ospf 10 area 0
R20(config-if-range)# interface Ethernet0/2
R20(config-if)# ip ospf 10 area 40
R20(config-if)# end
R20# write
explanation: Item 21/25/33 ailesinin varyantı (Process 10, Loopback0, /16): OSPF interface altında 'ip ospf 10 area X' ile açılır (Lo0/e0/0/e0/1 Area 0, e0/2 Area 40). Router-id = Loopback0 (10.0.1.20). /16 özet (255.255.0.0) ABR'de 'area 40 range 10.40.0.0 255.255.0.0' ile.
